coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a consistent aspiration for discipline and efficiency, yet your Sleep Protocol and Training are collapsing, directly contradicting the "lock in young" and "best worker" identity you declare. The gap between your morning intentions and actual execution, particularly around foundational physical disciplines, isn't just about missing habits; it's a profound disintegration of self-trust and the spiritual discipline required to embody your declared values. Today, before engaging with any external inputs, map out your 9:30 PM bedtime and 4:30 AM wake-up for the next 7 days, then physically block those times in your calendar.
